author: Milan O.
pros: I was not confident enough to use an AI to Improve the quality of my writing, as I had a feeling that it might not look real enough for my clients. I was thinking that they will notice that the quality, but the writing was natural. Another good thing that guests have notice is that guests have noticed the improvement in the quality of the responses. This helps me get better business and thus earning me more money. It does not require someone to be a tech wiz, so it is easy even for the beginner to use it. It is helpful in creating new content that I can use to boost my sales, thus I am getting more money, and it is all thanks to Originality AI. Its proofreading algorithm is of great help too as I can see the progress that I made by using this product. It is a great choice for people who own any business as it will improve their profit. I will continue to use this app, as it provides me with a lot of benefits that I need for my work.
cons: There's nothing to complain about.It meets my expectations.

review_title: Originality.AI has helped me a lot

pros: I used Originality.AI to check a recent blog post I wrote, and it was a lifesaver! It identified a few sections that might have unintentionally paraphrased from another source. I easily rephrased those parts to ensure my content was completely original. Great tool for writers who want to be on top of their audience mind.
